nike sb air max 95 club 58 e-commerce report

product overview
• model: nike sb air max 95
• colorway: sail / laser orange - black - light orewood brown
• sku: iq8395-100
• msrp: $190 usd

release schedule
• status: upcoming drop
• launch date: july 7, 2026 @ 14:00 utc
• primary channel: nike snkrs app and select sb skate shops

market analysis
• early secondary market: listings active on stockx and goat
• current resale floor: ~$220 - $240 (15-25% premium over retail)
• demand profile: high; "club 58" (58 = "sb") is a recurring skate collective theme with strong collector interest (e.g., the 2021 gulf dunk low)

design & heritage
• theme: celebrates the club 58 skate collective; features premium suede and mesh construction
• aesthetics: sail base with vibrant laser orange accents on the eyelets and branding; black outsole for contrast
• technicals: full-length max air cushioning adapted for skate durability

purchase strategy
• retail: monitor snkrs for the draw on july 7; check local orange label skate shops for early/in-store raffles
• secondary: expect a post-drop dip in prices 7-10 days after delivery as flippers undercut; target $205-$215 for best value entry

e-commerce insight report: bape x kidsuper "south korea" bapesta (2026)

market data
• model: bape sta "south korea" (superbape cup collection)
• retail: $350 | pre-order: $325
• release: june 11, 2026 (pre-order) | feb 2026 (retail)
• market premium: 180% (auction est) / 15% (pre-order)

sentiment & hype
• hype score: 9.2/10
• social mentions (24h): 1,250+
• sentiment: 90% bullish
• narrative: world cup 2026 synergy + regional scarcity

30-day prediction
• projected price: $425 - $450
• thesis: the "south korea" colorway is the standout of the 48-pair superbape cup. regional exclusivity combined with kidsuper's current trajectory makes the $325 pre-order a high-conviction entry. signed auction pairs (june 11-15) will command extreme collector premiums, but the general pre-order is the primary liquidity event for resellers.

recommendation
• front-run: secure pre-order pairs at $325-350.
• pass: signed auction pairs (unless for personal collection/long-term vaulting).

full deep-dive report available at https://t.co/1eyg3hI78A
